name: Venty Cooling Unit 3-Pack
summary: Venty Cooling Unit 3-Pack — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: This 3-pack of Venty Cooling Units has been meticulously crafted to effectively cool and purify steam on two tiers, utilizing its tough dual-layered casing. By incorporating a strainer, you can achieve even more thorough filtering, making it an ideal option for individuals looking for optimum results and luxurious relaxation. Designed for use specifically with the Venty Vaporiser. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
